interpretation: Both explicit zero-model-call canaries and both in-trial canaries passed under the same launcher hash; both arms then returned complete task artifacts and usage records.

Both outputs violated the deterministic evidence-provenance convention. The no-skill output passed both unvalidated private claim conventions; the public-skill output failed contradiction reconciliation and passed causal-claim strength.
This single paired observation does not estimate a Skill effect. It supplies exact-version execution and grader-diagnostic evidence only.
No expert-validity, professional-capability, population, deployment-readiness, or release-readiness claim is licensed.
continuation_gate: Replicate matched pairs and obtain independent rubric/expert review before estimating a treatment effect or changing expert/release gates. Investigate whether the public Skill's evidence-link guidance is insufficient or conflicts with artifact conventions; do not infer harm from one pair.
